overall.description: A static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from a video game, showing a wide river flowing past dense slum housing in the foreground with towering high-tech corporate skyscrapers rising in the background. The scene captures the stark contrast between the colorful makeshift shanty structures along the waterfront and the sleek glass-and-steel megastructures dominating the skyline under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront cityscape with slums and corporate district

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape from an elevated fixed vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: Wide murky river flowing through the city center with gentle ripples on the surface
Dense cluster of colorful makeshift structures with blue, red, and yellow rooftops built along the waterfront
Towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades, spires, and massive holographic displays dominating the horizon
Large red suspension bridge spanning the river with industrial support structures
White steam or smoke rising from industrial stacks among the slum buildings
Large illuminated advertising signs and neon displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: A static, sweeping view of a cyberpunk metropolis from an elevated position, showcasing the dramatic contrast between the ramshackle colorful slums lining the riverbank and the pristine corporate towers rising in the distance. The industrial river flows calmly through the center while smoke rises from the shanty district, and the red bridge stands as a prominent landmark on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a sweeping panoramic view of a cyberpunk metropolis that emphasizes the stark divide between urban decay and corporate luxury. It begins from an elevated vantage point, capturing the dramatic contrast between the ramshackle, colorful slums lining the riverbank and the pristine towers rising in the distance. As the camera glides across the landscape, the industrial river flows calmly through the center while plumes of smoke drift upward from the shanty district. The scene then expands to highlight the red bridge as a prominent landmark on the left, before settling on the towering glass-and-steel megastructures that dominate the skyline under a bright blue sky.
